title: Axolotlium
description: Axolotlium adds a post-netherite gear set that has a pretty obvious theme.
body:
Axolotlium adds a brand new post-netherite armour set that's unbreakable. You get most of the items by using the Axolotlium Upgrade Template, obtainable by interacting with an Axolotl while holding a Netherite Upgrade Template.

Also, I have a feedback form now! Check it out [here](https://forms.gle/yoqKg2okEsmqeWFx6)!

<details>
<summary>Items + Function</summary>
Axolotlium: Hold right click to summon an axolotl

Axolotlium Sword: Weakens anything hit that's underwater or being rained on, and has more range

Axolotlium Pickaxe: Has more reach, and mines underwater 25% faster than normal pickaxes

Axolotlium Axe: Same abilities as the sword

Axolotlium Shovel: Has more range

Axolotlium Hoe: Same as above but a hoe

Axolotlium Helmet: Grants Health Boost if touching Water or Rain

Axolotlium Chestplate: Grants Conduit Power

Axolotlium Leggings: Grants Dolphin's Grace

Axolotlium Boots: Grants Strength while touching Water or Rain

Axolotlium Block: No special ability

Axolotlium Lamp: Produces light

Axolotlium Apple: Grants a bunch of effects

Axolotlium Upgrade Template: Used to craft Axolotlium tools and armour
</details>

<details>
<summary>Legacy/1.20.1</summary>

Axolotlium is a Minecraft mod that adds a post-netherite axolotl based resource. This can be made into tools, armor, and an upgraded enchanted golden apple. These also have special effects and properties, such as the sword having the ability to summon axolotls, and the chestplate giving infinite water breathing.

Credits:
- Tobin - Most coding and art.
 
- Simon - art for axolotlium apple, block, and logo.

</details>
